metadata.title: Smart Asaan Mobile Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Smart Asaan Mobile Account is a digital wallet that enables banked as well as unbanked individuals to perform financial transactions securely even from their basic mobile phone.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Asaan Mobile Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Open your account even from your feature phone and earn halal profit on your savings! Asaan Mobile Account is a digital wallet that enables banked as well as unbanked individuals to perform financial transactions securely even from their basic mobile phone. With faster and more convenient service, the Mobile Account is designed to allow individuals to send or receive money easily to any account within Pakistan without internet connectivity. Asaan Mobile Account also offers a saving facility that gives competitive profit rate on savings along with the flexibility to use the money at any time. Requirements for Using Meezan Asaan Mobile Account Asaan Mobile Account can be opened in PKR only. A valid CNIC is required for opening this account. Mobile Account can only be activated after successful verification. Key Features Instant account opening Instant account opening facility Link channel Facility to link existing smart wallet with AMA channel Biometric scanning Cash withdrawal facility from any Meezan Bank branch after biometric verification Transaction execution from basic mobile phone No Internet Required No internet facility required to access account Internet and Online Banking Free internet and mobile banking services Deposit No minimum deposit requirement Profit paid on monthly basis and calculated on daily basis Terms & Conditions Key Fact Statements (KFS) How Asaan Mobile Account Works? Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Asaan Mobile Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool and fund from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Asaan Mobile Account Monthly 0.46 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Mobile Account Monthly 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates How to use Smart Asaan Mobile Account? Simply dial the short code *2262# in order to avail this service. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
